nodes.label: AI as tool for small, specific coding tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I often use AI to solve small tasks, such as string manipulation, or debugging my code

nodes.label: Writing initial code independently
nodes.label_negative: Delegating initial code writing to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write the starting code out myself

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the model does not understand my instructions, or forgets them

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: I will give it tasks to handle independently, but often I find that there are issues with a provided solution, and need to collaborate

nodes.label: AI as tool for skill growth
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I like to keep it as a tool so my skills continue to grow, and not completely rely on it

nodes.label: Independent skill development and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I need to know understand what the code is doing first and grow my abilities independently

nodes.label: Efficient problem-solving and debugging
nodes.grounding_span: It can find a small mistake in my code causing a bug

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging small mistakes
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied when it can find a small mistake in my code causing a bug

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misunderstanding instructions
nodes.grounding_span: I can get frustrated when I need a coding solution and the model does not understand my instructions

nodes.label: Preference for AI as tool, not replacement
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to use it as a tool rather than relying on it for my work

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: need to collaborate to get the result I want

nodes.label: Independent foundation then AI refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write the starting code out myself, and then get a model to refine or debug it
